title: Career Opportunity Category Manager at Melorra Capital India

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Category Manager at Melorra Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Melorra Capital India! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Delhi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Melorra Capital India:
Melorra Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Melorra Capital India!
